data.name: FullTextAvailable
data.value: Full Text Available

data.name: FullTextAvailableTooltip
data.value: This title is available in your collection.

data.name: ResourceAccessDenied
data.value: You do not have access to this resource at this time. R2 users, please login or {0} for more information.

data.name: TitleArchived
data.value: This title has been archived.

data.name: TitleArchivedTooltip
data.value: This title has been officially declared out of print by the publisher and remains available for viewing with institutional ownership.

data.name: TOCAvailable
data.value: Table of Contents Available

data.name: TOCAvailableTooltip
data.value: This table of contents is available in your collection.

data.name: TOCAvailablePDATooltip
data.value: This title is being considered for purchase by the library and is currently not accessible. Please contact your library administrator for more information.

data.name: ResourceAccessLocked
data.value: This content is currently unavailable because all of the licenses are in use. Please try again shortly.

data.name: CurrentPasswordIncorrect
data.value: Current Password is incorrect.

data.name: PasswordsDoNotMatch
data.value: Passwords do not match.

data.name: UserIsRequired
data.value: Username is required

data.name: UserNameCommas
data.value: Username cannot contain commas

data.name: UserNameAlreadyInUse
data.value: This UserName is already in use.

data.name: ReactivatePleaseFillInPassword
data.value: A new password is required to reactivate an account

data.name: PleaseFillInPassword
data.value: Please fill in a password

data.name: PasswordNotValid
data.value: Password must be 8 to 20 characters and contain 3 out of 4: Upper case, Lower case, Number, Special Character `~!@#$%^&*()><?:,./\;'|-

data.name: AccountDoesNotExistInPrelude
data.value: Sorry this account does not exist in prelude.

data.name: AccountAlreadyExists
data.value: Sorry this account already exists.

data.name: UserNameAlreadyExists
data.value: This Username already exists. Please try a different UserName.

data.name: DoodyCoreTitle
data.value: This is a Doody Core Title

data.name: EssentialDoodyCoreTitle
data.value: This is an Essential Doody Core Title

data.name: BrandonHillSelection
data.value: This Title is a Brandon Hill Selection

data.name: PasswordMinMaxLength
data.value: Password Max Length is 20 and Minimum Length is 4 characters

data.name: PdaResourceAccessDenied
data.value: This title is being considered for purchase by the library and is currently not accessible. Please {0} to contact your library administrator for more information. The information for this title will be automatically included in your message.

data.name: RecaptchaDenied
data.value: You have failed the Recaptcha entry form to many times. Please try again later.

data.name: PdaAccessDenied
data.value: This title is not currently accessible. If you want your library to consider purchasing it, click “Suggest for Purchase” and complete the title request form. Let your library know you are interested in using this title. The information for this title will be automatically included in your message.

data.name: PdaAccessDeniedAdmin
data.value: This title is being considered for purchase by the library and is currently not accessible. This title is on PDA and has triggered because it reached the maximum views.
